## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives

What workaround do you use today?

## Scope Notes

Codex Lite aims to stay local-first, lightweight, ad-free, and easy to inspect. Please mention any new dependency, network behavior, storage change, or credential handling impact.
